description.value:
This is used as the material component for the @UUID[Compendium.elkan5e.elkan5e-spells.Item.Al4cudyzaoFQ2V0u]{Forcecage}and @UUID[Compendium.elkan5e.elkan5e-spells.Item.bBlu6c1qrO3BSesg]{Simulacrum} spells, which cannot be cast unless this component is carried by the caster.

This component is consumed by casting of the spell.
